title: Excuse Me, I'm Lost
learningGoal: Speak fluently to ask for directions, confirm instructions, and ask about locations.
instructions: あなたは海外旅行中で、道に迷ってしまいました。地元の人に道を尋ねるロールプレイをします。マイクに向かって、英語で質問や確認をしてください。(You are traveling and lost. Roleplay asking a local for directions. Speak into the microphone to ask questions and confirm instructions.)
speakingPrompt: Roleplay asking for directions to the airport and confirming the route.
scenario: You are lost in a foreign city and need to find the airport.

subTasks.prompt: Ask how to get to the airport. (Excuse me, how do I get to the airport?)

sampleResponse.targetText: Excuse me, how do I get to the airport?
sampleResponse.transliteration: エクスキューズ ミー、ハウ ドゥー アイ ゲット トゥ ザ エアポート？
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: すみません、空港にはどうやって行けばいいですか？

subTasks.prompt: The local says: 'Go straight and turn left at the traffic light.' Confirm this by repeating: 'Turn left at the traffic light?'

sampleResponse.targetText: Turn left at the traffic light?
sampleResponse.transliteration: ターン レフト アット ザ トラフィック ライト？
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: 信号を左に曲がるんですね？

subTasks.prompt: The local says: 'Yes. It is near the station.' Ask if it is next to the station. (Is it next to the station?)

sampleResponse.targetText: Is it next to the station?
sampleResponse.transliteration: イズ イット ネクスト トゥ ザ ステーション？

scenarioContext.targetText: You see a friendly local person. Ask them for help.
scenarioContext.transliteration: ユー シー ア フレンドリー ローカル パーソン。アスク ゼム フォー ヘルプ。
scenarioContext.baseTranslation: 親切そうな地元の人を見つけました。助けを求めてください。

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: Excuse me, how do I get to the airport?
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: エクスキューズ ミー、ハウ ドゥー アイ ゲット トゥ ザ エアポート？
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: すみません、空港にはどうやって行けばいいですか？

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: Turn left at the traffic light?
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ターン レフト アット ザ トラフィック ライト？
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: 信号を左に曲がるんですね？

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: Is it next to the station?
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: イズ イット ネクスト トゥ ザ ステーション？

expectedSpeakingPoints: Asking for directions using 'How do I get to...'
Asking a yes/no question using 'next to'
acceptableParaphrases: Excuse me, how can I get to the airport? Turn left at the traffic light? Is it next to the station?

criteria.name: Direction Phrases
criteria.description: Must use the exact phrase 'how do I get to' and 'turn left'.

criteria.name: Prepositions
criteria.description: Must use 'at the traffic light' and 'next to'.

criteria.name: Intonation
criteria.description: Voice should go up at the end of the questions to sound like confirmation.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: Excuse me, how do I get to the airport? Turn left at the traffic light? Is it next to the station?

feedbackRules.onPass: Great job! You sound like a natural traveler. Your pronunciation and intonation were excellent.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please try again. Make sure you use the full phrase 'How do I get to...' instead of just 'Where is...'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort! Remember to raise your pitch at the end of 'Turn left at the traffic light?' to show you are confirming what they said.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Excuse me, how do I get to the airport? Turn left at the traffic light? Is it next to the station?

hintText: Don't forget to say 'Excuse me' before asking the question. It's polite!
commonMistakes: Saying 'How to go to the airport?' instead of 'How do I get to...?'
